title: PlantsAnywhere
description:
Place plants anywhere you want (even the air).
Designed for creative builders that want that extra bit of decoration.
body:
Tl;dr Place plants anywhere you want.

### Did you ever want to plant sweet berry bushes in the snow?

Nether warts on lava? 

Create a floating garland of grass?

Now you can!

![Garland of gras, spore blossom and glow lichen between two houses.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0d5299240bfbfae4c0d10191aa32eca4a7c5b834.png)


**This mod lets you place almost all plants and plant like blocks anywhere. Even the air.**

It does not influence world generation at all.

Plants that have been placed by a player or a structure blocks are affected.

## Required on Server AND Client to work properly!

_If you like the mod and want to support me, see the link section for donation options :)_


The mod also allows to use the upper half of tall plants only as a decoration. Simply break the bottom half. The upper half will remain. Break the upper half, both will break.


## Place anywhere
- all crops
- all flowers
- all saplings
- no decay on leaf blocks (when they are placed by a structure block or player)

  
- cocoa beans
- coral fans
- dripleafs
- dried bush
- fern
- glow berries
- hanging roots
- lily pad
- mushrooms (light level still matters)
- pink petals
- pitcher plant
- pointed dripstone
- roots
- sea pickle
- spore blossom
- sugar cane
- torch flower
- twisting vines
- weeping vines

## Partly implemented
- chorus plants
- vines
- glow berries



### Known issues:
- the behavior when the "partly implemented" ones break, and when they don't, is very inconsistent
- some plants sometimes loose their "place anywhere" status when they grow

**If you find any bugs, please open a ticket and I will address them asap.**


### Development Roadmap:
- fix remainder of growing plants
- add config to switch on/off each plant individually
- kelp + sea grass plantable on land
- add 1.21 version of the mod

Disclaimer:
- this mod will be essential for an upcoming big mod of mine, therefore it will be fully supported and further developed along side it
- support for different minecraft versions is currenlty a low priority, although that might change if the mod becomes popular :)
